source_summary.public_boundary: Public-safe aggregate only. No .bos internals, DevPack, raw receipts, prompt libraries, source internals, tokens, or customer/project data.

capability_groups.name: Plan
capability_groups.audience: Founders, product owners, AI app builders
capability_groups.plain_language_outcome: Turn an idea into a clear app direction, target audience, stage, risks, and next build intention.
capability_groups.proof_level: 7 product maturity signals mapped to a public-safe summary

capability_groups.name: Build
capability_groups.audience: Base44 builders, Codex / VS Code developers
capability_groups.plain_language_outcome: Give AI builders narrower jobs, clearer context, safer prompts, and better stop conditions.
capability_groups.proof_level: 6 product maturity signals mapped to a public-safe summary
discovery_prompts: stop the AI making a mess

capability_groups.name: Scan
capability_groups.audience: Developers fixing drift, broken pages, and unclear failures
capability_groups.plain_language_outcome: Inspect pages, flows, authority, lifecycle, evidence, platform constraints, and maturity before broad rebuilds.
capability_groups.proof_level: 14 product maturity signals mapped to a public-safe summary

capability_groups.name: Fix
capability_groups.audience: Builders with a broken app or recurring AI-build failures
capability_groups.plain_language_outcome: Route issues into scoped repair paths instead of repeating broad prompts and unverified fixes.
capability_groups.proof_level: 6 product maturity signals mapped to a public-safe summary

capability_groups.name: Govern
capability_groups.audience: Teams that need continuity, handoff, and safer development loops
capability_groups.plain_language_outcome: Keep project memory, decisions, routes, receipts, and evidence visible across sessions and tools.
capability_groups.proof_level: 59 product maturity signals mapped to a public-safe summary

capability_groups.name: Recover
capability_groups.audience: Target-app owners and teams managing fragile builder-generated files
capability_groups.plain_language_outcome: Detect missing or corrupt local BOS governance files, recover from backup where possible, and warn when Cloud templates are only provisional.
capability_groups.proof_level: 5 product maturity signals mapped to a public-safe summary

capability_groups.name: Prepare
capability_groups.plain_language_outcome: Assess private beta, launch, support, rollback, privacy, billing, and release-readiness gates without overclaiming readiness.
capability_groups.proof_level: 7 product maturity signals mapped to a public-safe summary

discovery_policy.rule: Surface at most one relevant BOS feature suggestion when a user prompt clearly matches a capability group. Keep it playful and useful, not spammy.
discovery_policy.less_obvious_rule: If the match is plausible but uncertain, ask whether the user wants BOS to handle it once or remember the phrasing for this project.
discovery_policy.privacy_boundary: Use category-level prompt patterns only. Do not store raw prompts, customer records, secrets, source code, logs, screenshots, or private project data.
